message:
🐛 Replace browser confirm with custom dialog for pod deletion (Fixes #10478) (#10484)

- Replace window.confirm() with the app's ConfirmDialog component for
  pod deletion, matching the pattern used elsewhere in the codebase
- Include actual error details in restart and delete failure toasts
  instead of generic "Failed to restart/delete pod" messages
- Add loading state to the confirm dialog button during deletion

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
